hero.title: The Logic Behind the Magic
hero.subtitle: My journey from curious explorer to data-driven growth architect.

start.title: The Foundation
start.desc: Started with a strong foundation in Business Administration at JIIT, specializing in Marketing. Discovered a passion for the intersection of data and human behavior.

early.title: Organic Growth
early.desc: Dove into SEO and organic content. Learned how to build audiences from scratch at ABP, scaling channels to thousands of followers without ad spend.

mid.title: The Shift to Paid
mid.desc: Realized the power of amplification. Mastered Google and Meta Ads at Tradebuilder and Intertek, optimizing spend for B2B and global markets.

current.title: Scale & Innovation
current.desc: Led growth at Pocket FM. Built automated creative testing engines and managed significant ad spends to drive global user acquisition.

future.title: Strategic Pivot
future.desc: Started an MSc in Marketing at the University of Groningen, pivoting toward AI-driven strategy and data-led growth leadership.

cards.title: Data > Opinion
cards.desc: Every decision is backed by metrics. If you can't measure it, you can't improve it.

cards.title: Creative is the New Targeting
cards.desc: In a post-Andromeda world, the algorithm rewards creative quality over manual audience selection. Your best targeting lever is the ad itself.

cards.title: Full Funnel Mindset
cards.desc: Acquisition is just the start. Retention and LTV are where the real profit lies.

hero.name: Kanishk Singh
hero.description: I design paid media, CRO, and growth systems that scale revenue. Specializing in data-driven campaign optimization, funnel design, and performance analytics across B2B and B2C channels.

pocketfm.title: Ad Operations Specialist
bullets: Own Meta Ads execution across acquisition and engagement campaigns supporting large scale user growth across multiple geographies.
Built structured creative and audience testing systems that improved click through rate by approximately 16% and reduced cost per result by approximately 14%.
Designed live performance dashboards to monitor spend efficiency, creative performance, and scaling readiness.

intertek.title: Digital Marketing Executive
bullets: Led paid search, paid social, and organic campaigns supporting multiple service lines across South Asia.
Optimised landing pages, enquiry forms, and lead routing to improve sales handoff and pipeline quality.
Used GA4 funnel analysis and CRO testing to improve conversion rate by approximately 18% and increase marketing qualified leads by approximately 22%.

tradebuilder.title: Digital Marketing Associate
bullets: Built weekly GA4 based funnel and cohort reports to identify optimisation and scaling opportunities.
Ran A/B tests across ad creatives and landing pages, improving click-through rate by approximately 12%.
Contributed to an improvement of approximately 20% in paid media return on investment.

leadEngine.title: Automated B2B Lead Generation Engine
bullets: Built an n8n-based automated lead engine that scraped, enriched, scored, and routed B2B leads into Airtable, Google Sheets, and CRM systems.
Integrated AI keyword generation, contact extraction, deduplication, and multi-channel outreach workflows across email, WhatsApp, and Slack.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies
caseStudies.subtitle: Detailed performance marketing projects and results

packt.title: Scaling Paid GTM for Events
packt.problem: A complete go-to-market strategy and post-campaign results report for a paid, 2-hour hands-on workshop targeting engineers shipping production LLM features under tight deadlines. The campaign successfully acquired {{attendees}} paid attendees at a ${{cac}} blended CAC while maintaining {{netNew}}% net-new acquisition and healthy unit economics.
actions: Implemented a phased Meta Ads strategy: Learning (6 ad sets), Scale (top performers), and Retargeting
Established Tier 1 (Rev-share) and Tier 2 (Flat-fee) creator partnerships with 5K+ audiences
Executed community seeding via newsletter sponsorships and placements in GitHub, Reddit, and Discord

jrb.title: 30-Day CRO Strategy for JonesRoadBeauty.com
jrb.problem: The brand was leaking revenue across product pages, shade selection, checkout, and post-purchase flows with no internal analytics access at the start.
actions: Mapped the full funnel from PDP to post-purchase using outside-in UX and competitive research
Built hypothesis-driven test clusters for clarity, shade anxiety, first-time buyers, and checkout confidence
Sequenced tests to prioritize conversion rate before AOV or urgency
Defined guardrails and decision rules to prevent noisy or conflicting experiments

audio.title: Scaling User Acquisition for an Audio Platform
audio.problem: This 90-day growth initiative focused on scaling user acquisition for a leading audio entertainment platform while improving cost efficiency in a highly competitive market. The strategy emphasised retention-aware acquisition, mobile-first creative testing, and disciplined channel optimisation across Meta and Google.
actions: Transitioned to 15-second mobile-first vertical video creatives tailored for 'sound-on' engagement
Deployed regional language variations and 'Free' messaging hooks to unlock new audience pools
Targeted high-LTV 'Commuter' demographics through granular audience segmentation
Leveraged CBO and Cost Caps to maintain efficiency during the accelerated scaling phase

aiLeads.title: Production Hardened AI Lead Engine
aiLeads.problem: Cold outreach requires significant manual research and qualification. This 26-node n8n workflow completely automates Google Maps scraping, ScrapingBee site crawling, AI-driven data cleansing, and CRM deduplication with built-in Slack alerts and automated gatekeeping.
actions: Replaced brittle basic HTTP triggers with Webhooks returning immediate 202 Accepted status
Integrated ScrapingBee to bypass Cloudflare and scrape React/JS-rendered sites via proxies
Prompt engineered GPT-4o-mini to sniff out deeply obfuscated emails (info [at] domain)
Added zero-record deduplication gating before committing data to Airtable/Sheets
